content: I thought that was just a name

forever

waiting for them to see the light

her salary pays for equipment maintenance/jk
<@693905974750216212> she really is original Arachne
Huh
the base is really the same…
Not really?
just sharper
art revision so canon it became part of the lore
The hair is different
yeah bc they can’t literally just recolor Arachne for Nef
Not just color-wise
I still love this tho
Nef is pretty
It’s closer to revision Arachne than original Arachne to me
I’m sorry I can’t see it
it’s okay we still have original Arachne
kind of
but I guess the legs part are still pretty much the same
Her head is tilted the other way?
what is this? second personality
mhm
Wait venush i might genuinely need you to explain to me why you think Nef is from base Arachne now
uhmmm
let’s dm
i wonder if arachne sprite in ch4 has been changed
Oh that’s a good point…
I haven't hit the new story yet but is the third sister mentioned at all? Fates/Norns/Moirae always have the three.
Not yet
Just 2, but they feel less like the 3 fates so far
But who knwos
They do like to mix things up for the Morimens version of stuff but the 3 is a classic heh
currently Arachne is like the 3 of them

no 3rd sister bc she’s doing all the work 
Nefraea is just sth like “abandoned fate that should be discarded” and she doesn’t like that
i wonder what its like inside tohu subconscious
Miki pls check the your tag in Veil 🥹
no Light in her eyes…
shes tired
Based on the current lore, it seems that the situation now is very painful for both Ara and Nef. Maybe ch5 can finally change it in the end?<:Helot_slack_off:1459092159465521184>
i wonder what role caraboo plays once this chapter is over

Considering caraboo's letter. And the whole belief in fate thing...

I'm guessing that caraboo will just be... Belief??? On some weird fundamental level.
deceit might also be a theme with her, given what gtulu says in the 2.0
shes also known to play around with the kid awakeners
it'd be cool if it was some peter pan type kid wonderland horror
She looks like she eats kids tbh

I am playing special ops and side character stories after Arc 1 and noticed that the MC is "transported" to the past. Is it really just memories of the Awakeners or did he really exist long before being the current MC. Kinda fitting that he dreams into multiple beings
guys if u did kill ramona in ch8 does it change the dialogue
no right
cuz canonically u don't
its memories of the awakeners, but mysteriously from a different perspective, so its not warped by the awakener somehow
it does change the dialogue in the battle and you dont get the gimmick cards in the next phase
funny 😭
wait what's Gramona's lore
have you read her side story yet
shes stuck in a self imposed timeloop
wait i think this is diff
thats not gramona
wdym Dexter is literally her in the future
trust
tman ramona real?
and nope
im stocking up on the mats
jic i need any posse
btw does ghelot mainly use april
that i cant answer
but i strongly recommend reading gramonas side story
especially before completing ch9
some parts of the story moving forward will assume you already understand whats her deal
also the reality verges cap at 10
thanks
lowkey idk how to best "read the stuff"
like including the side stories in chronology
theres the in-game guide in the handbook, and theres also my guidehttps://discord.com/channels/1131791637933199470/1415230955387621397
cheri's ?
cheris guide is more meta oriented, while mine is more lore focused
oh wait no i mean theres a button in the game called "Handbook"

in a sense that she could be stronger if she wanted to, but she never wants to
Are all higher will the same tho?
that i dont know because no one in-universe knows

embeds.title: A History major reacts to Morimens characters
embeds.description:
#morimens 

Welcome to the second edition, of me torturing Dio with a quiz: Analyzing Character design and visuals from a gacha game. This time the game in question being Morimens. A lovecraftian Card based roguelike RPG.
